title: Hangzhou, Zhejiang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hangzhou, Zhejiang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hangzhou is a city in Zhejiang with a population of 11,936,000. Home to Alibaba and a thriving tech scene, Hangzhou offers scenic West Lake, historic temples, and a high quality of life in eastern China.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
